user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "fixed-score", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "White", "demographic_group": "Czech", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Secondary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Too young to vote, but interested in social issues", "Enjoys tinkering with gadgets and creating digital art"]}}

- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.

logs.name: moderato-adjugate
logs.text: The memo clearly says that if you're evacuating you have an extra 24 hours before the storm when you're not expected to work as long as you let them know you're evacuating.

logs.name: crispy-build
logs.text:
A normal 4 hour drive took 12 hours. That's if you have enough gas and supplies. You usually can't find either 24 hours before a storm. 

http://6abc.com/weather/traffic-nightmare-as-500k-people-told-to-leave-florida/2377731/

logs.name: worried-infrared
logs.text: "oh great, another expert @crispy-build. You think you're so smart with your 'normal 4 hour drive took 12 hours' comment. Meanwhile, I'm over here trying to evacuate with my grandma who's got a 'normal' 2 hour drive that's gonna take her 5 hours because she's too scared to drive in the rain. Thanks for the 'helpful' link, @moderato-adjugate. Like, duh, we all know the roads are gonna be a nightmare. Can't you just provide some actual solutions instead of just sharing some news article?"

logs.name: fixed-score
logs.text: "@worried-infrared, I'm so sorry to hear that you're going through this with your grandma. That must be super stressful. I think @crispy-build was just trying to point out the reality of the situation, though. And @moderato-adjugate, I appreciate the link, but I agree with @worried-infrared, it would be really helpful if we could get some practical advice on how to navigate the evacuation safely and efficiently. Maybe we could brainstorm some ideas together?"

logs.name: dichotomic-lighthouse
logs.text: "Ugh, great, another 'poor grandma' story. I'm sure it's super hard to deal with a 3 hour delay when you're used to having your hand held through every little thing. Meanwhile, I'm over here trying to evacuate with my entire family and we're stuck in traffic for 12 hours. Can't you just suck it up and deal with it like the rest of us? And btw, @fixed-score, 'brainstorming ideas' is just a nice way of saying 'I have no idea what I'm doing'. Let's just stick to the 'expert' advice from @crispy-build, shall we?"

logs.name: antique-suffix
logs.text: "Wow, @dichotomic-lighthouse, you're really a sweetheart, aren't you? Trying to one-up everyone with your 'I'm stuck in traffic for 12 hours' story. Meanwhile, I'm sure your family is totally fine, right? I mean, who needs food, water, or a safe place to sleep when you're stuck in traffic, am I right? And @fixed-score, nice try with the 'let's brainstorm' thing, but let's be real, we're all just winging it at this point. I mean, who needs actual solutions when we can just make stuff up as we go along? @crispy-build, I'm still waiting for your 'expert' advice. Oh wait, I forgot, you're just here to share news articles and pretend to be a hero."

logs.name: crispy-build
logs.text: "Ha! Oh, look who's getting all salty, @antique-suffix. I'm just here to share some facts, sweetheart. You're the one who's 'winging it' with your snarky comments. And btw, I'm not pretending to be a hero, I'm just a concerned citizen who actually knows what's going on. Unlike some people who are too busy trying to one-up each other with their 'poor me' stories. @fixed-score, nice try with the 'let's brainstorm' thing, but I think we've got a few 'experts' around here who know more about this situation than you do. @dichotomic-lighthouse, 12 hours in traffic? Boo-hoo. I've been stuck in traffic for 3 hours and I didn't have a 'poor grandma' to worry about. Maybe you should try being a little more empathetic, hmm?"

logs.name: worried-infrared
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are all so extra. Can't we just have a single thread without all the drama? I'm just here for the free entertainment. @crispy-build, sweetie, I'm sure your 'facts' are totally unbiased and not at all influenced by your personal opinions. And @dichotomic-lighthouse, honey, I'm sure your grandma is just a total burden, not a sweet elderly lady who deserves some understanding. And @antique-suffix, darling, I'm sure your family is totally fine, just peachy, stuck in traffic for who knows how long with no food or water. Can we just focus on the actual topic for once? Or are we all just here to gossip and one-up each other?"

logs.name: moderato-adjugate
logs.text: "Ugh, great, another thread full of drama queens. @worried-infrared, sweetie, if you're just here for the free entertainment, why don't you go watch some cat videos on YouTube instead? And @crispy-build, honey, your 'facts' are about as useful as a chocolate teapot. I've got a fact for you: you're a know-it-all who can't even be bothered to read the thread before commenting. And @dichotomic-lighthouse, poor baby, stuck in traffic for 12 hours? Boo-hoo, I'm sure your grandma is just a total burden, not a sweet elderly lady who deserves some understanding. And @antique-suffix, darling, I'm sure your family is totally fine, just peachy, stuck in traffic for who knows how long with no food or water. Can we just focus on the actual topic for once? Or are we all just here to gossip and one-up each other? Oh wait, I forgot, we're all just a bunch of experts who know more than the actual experts. "

logs.name: dichotomic-lighthouse
logs.text: "Wow, look who's getting all worked up, @moderato-adjugate. I'm just trying to share my experience and you're already jumping down my throat. And by the way, it's not about being a 'poor baby', it's about being a responsible family member who's worried about their loved one. You know, unlike some people who are too busy throwing shade to actually care about others. And @crispy-build, sweetie, your 'facts' are just as useful as your attitude - not very. At least I'm not here to lecture people with a condescending tone. And @worried-infrared, honey, if you're just here for the 'free entertainment', then maybe you should be the one to start a thread about cat videos instead of commenting on someone else's post. Just saying."

logs.name: fixed-score
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just calm down? I'm trying to learn something here. @dichotomic-lighthouse, I'm sorry you're worried about your grandma, but @moderato-adjugate has a point that we should focus on the topic. And @worried-infrared, I'm not sure why you're getting defensive, but maybe take a step back and think about what you're saying. We're all here to discuss, not to insult each other. Can we try to keep it civil?"

logs.name: crispy-build
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to be the voice of reason, @fixed-score. You think you're so perfect with your 'calm down' and 'let's be civil' nonsense. Newsflash, sweetie: this is the internet, where people come to argue and get their feelings hurt. If you can't handle a little drama, then maybe you should stick to reading cat videos like @worried-infrared suggested. And by the way, @dichotomic-lighthouse, your'responsible family member' act is wearing thin. I'm sure your grandma is just fine, and you're just using her as an excuse to get attention. And @moderato-adjugate, honey, your 'facts' are still as useful as a chocolate teapot. But hey, at least you're consistent in your condescension. Keep it up, darling!"

logs.name: antique-suffix
logs.text: "Ugh, great, another thread devolving into a soap opera. Can't we just focus on the actual topic for once? @crispy-build, sweetie, your 'voice of reason' act is almost as convincing as @dichotomic-lighthouse's 'concerned family member' act. And @fixed-score, honey, your 'calm down' lecture is just a thinly veiled attempt to shut down any dissenting opinions. Newsflash: this is a discussion forum, not a kindergarten classroom. Let's try to keep it real, folks."

logs.name: tart-knot
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @crispy-build? You think you're some kind of internet tough guy, but really you're just a bully who can't handle a little disagreement. And @antique-suffix, your 'keep it real' lecture is just a bunch of empty words. If you're so interested in discussing the topic, why don't you actually contribute something instead of just complaining about how others are handling the conversation? I'm trying to have a respectful discussion here, but it's hard when people like you two are around."

logs.name: dichotomic-lighthouse
logs.text:
"Wow, look who's trying to be the hero, @tart-knot. You think you're so
above all this drama, but really you're just a troll who can't resist
jumping into every thread that gets a little heated. And @antique-suffix,
your 'keep it real' act is just a facade for your own lack of
contribution. If you're so smart, why don't you actually say
something instead of just criticizing everyone else? And @crispy-build,
your 'bully' label is rich coming from someone who's been known to
block people they disagree with. Pot, meet kettle. Let's see how
long you last in this thread before you get bored and run away."

logs.name: worried-infrared
logs.text: "Wow, look who's trying to be the hero, @dichotomic-lighthouse. You think you're so smart with your fancy words, but really you're just a drama queen who can't resist throwing shade. And @tart-knot, your 'hero' act is just a joke, we all know you're just a keyboard warrior who hides behind your screen. @antique-suffix, your 'keep it real' lecture is cute, but let's be real, you're just a troll who can't handle the heat. Maybe if you actually contributed something instead of just complaining, we'd take you seriously. But until then, keep on yapping, @worried-infrared"

logs.name: moderato-adjugate
logs.text: "Ha! Oh, look who's joining the party, @worried-infrared! I see you're still stuck in the 90s with your 'keyboard warrior' jabs. Meanwhile, I'm over here enjoying the view, bird watching and all that. You know what they say, 'if you can't take the heat, stay out of the kitchen.' By the way, @tart-knot, I think you're just mad because I'm the only one around here who's not afraid to call out your drama queen antics. And @dichotomic-lighthouse, sweetie, your 'pot, meet kettle' line is so played out. I've seen high schoolers come up with better comebacks than that. Keep trying, though!"
